notes: This product slice runs on the canonical Forseti site and reuses the shared Forseti QA seat.
Independent release preflight is disabled for this product; executable QA remains tracked under the parent Forseti suite until a dedicated safety-specific suite is warranted.

suites.label: QA handled by parent Forseti suite
